context_pointers.vague_reference: follow the formatting logic used in network format
context_pointers.actual_meaning: This refers to the pattern observed in C002 and C003 where '10s' is derived from an integer second count, implying a unit suffix convention.

oracle_data.fallback_response: I don't have more detail on that — check the codebase or the existing test cases for the exact behavior.

feature10_1_cli_option_parsing.json.description: Parses command-line arguments into a selected operation and structured operation options.

feature1_1_duration_formatting.json.description: Formats elapsed time values as canonical duration text and as JSON/YAML scalar strings.

feature1_2_duration_parsing.json.description: Parses duration scalar values from serialized input and reports the equivalent seconds and canonical text.

feature2_1_cpu_units.json.description: Normalizes CPU capacity text into the integer CPU-unit string expected by container task definitions.

feature2_2_memory_units.json.description: Normalizes memory capacity text into the integer MiB string expected by container task definitions.

feature3_1_tag_string_parsing.json.description: Parses comma-separated key/value tag text into ordered key/value records and reports neutral errors for malformed tag text.

feature3_2_tag_map_rendering.json.description: Renders a string map as a stable comma-separated key=value list sorted by key.

feature3_3_tag_change_sets.json.description: Compares previous and next tag collections and reports added, updated, and deleted records.

feature4_1_cloud_resource_arn_shape.json.description: Classifies container-service resource identifiers as short or long resource-name formats.

feature4_2_role_name_extraction.json.description: Extracts the terminal role name from valid identity role identifiers and reports a neutral error for non-role identifiers.

feature4_3_container_image_registry_dete.description: Detects whether a container image reference points to the expected managed container registry URL pattern.

feature5_1_version_constraints.json.description: Evaluates whether the current tool version satisfies a configured version constraint and reports neutral failure categories.

feature6_1_desired_task_count.json.description: Computes the desired task count to send during deployment from service state, scheduling strategy, and an optional requested override.

feature7_1_configuration_loading.json.description: Loads deployment configuration files, applies environment defaults, and exposes key resolved paths and timing settings.

feature7_2_service_definition_loading.js.description: Loads a service definition file and exposes the externally meaningful service, deployment, load-balancer, and tag fields.

cases.expected_output:
service=test
desired_count=2
launch_type=EC2
scheduling_strategy=REPLICA
target_group=arn:aws:elasticloadbalancing:us-east-1:1111111111:targetgroup/test/12345678
tag_0=cluster:default2
deploy_max_percent=200
deploy_min_healthy_percent=50
alarm=HighResponseLatencyAlarm

feature7_3_task_definition_loading.json.description: Loads task definition files and exposes meaningful fields resolved from templates, plain files, and definition-embedded tags.

cases.expected_output:
family=katsubushi
ephemeral_storage_gib=25
first_container=katsubushi
docker_label_name=katsubushi
log_group=fargate
tags=null

feature8_1_parameter_lookup.json.description: Looks up parameter values from a parameter store adapter, including indexed list values and neutral argument errors.

feature9_1_runtime_platform.json.description: Converts runtime-platform settings into normalized architecture and operating-system labels used for container image validation.

_constraints.input_condition: Input contains integer 'duration_seconds' or string 'texts' equivalent to integer seconds.
_constraints.output_rule: Output 'text' as human readable seconds string (e.g., 10s), 'json' as JSON string containing 'text' key with text value, 'yaml' as scalar text value equal to 'text'.

_constraints.input_condition: Input contains string 'value' enclosed in quotes ('value=\
_constraints.output_rule: Parse string value to integer seconds, output 'seconds' as integer and 'text' as human readable seconds string.
Parse string value to integer seconds, output 'seconds' as integer and 'text' as human readable seconds string.

_constraints.input_condition: Input contains string 'value' that is purely a plain integer.
_constraints.output_rule: Output 'cpu' as the integer value string.

_constraints.input_condition: Input contains string 'value' that is purely 'vCPU' followed by integer (e.g., '256vCPU').
_constraints.output_rule: Convert 'vCPU' value to 'cpu' units (1 vCPU = 1024 units).

_constraints.input_condition: Input contains a value that is not a plain integer or valid vCPU string.
Input contains string 'value' that is purely a plain integer.
_constraints.output_rule: Output 'memory' as the integer value string.

_constraints.input_condition: Input contains string 'value' that is purely 'GiB' followed by integer (e.g., '512GiB').
_constraints.output_rule: Convert 'GiB' value to 'memory' MiB (1 GiB = 1024 MiB).
